description_long: This is a single brown leather slip-on dress shoe with a low, stacked wooden heel and a rounded square toe. The upper is crafted from smooth, dark brown leather with subtle stitching details along the vamp and sides, giving it a refined and classic appearance. The interior lining appears to be a lighter tan leather, providing a contrast to the darker exterior. The sole is made of a lighter brown material, likely wood or synthetic, and is slightly raised at the heel for added support. There are no visible laces, buckles, or logos, emphasizing a minimalist and formal design. The shoe is in good structural condition, with no visible scuffs, stains, or significant wear.
description: A brown leather slip-on dress shoe with a square toe, low wooden heel, and subtle stitching, featuring a clean, minimalist design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the smooth brown leather upper, subtle stitching, and the low wooden heel.
description_view_1: Front angled view highlighting the rounded square toe and the seamless slip-on design.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the continuous leather upper and the heel's profile.
description_view_3: Rear angled view showing the heel, back seam, and a glimpse of the interior lining.
